title: Production GitHub webhook mirror for roadmap issues

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
Production GitHub webhook mirror for roadmap issues

## Scope

Configure `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` on Coolify tracker deploy; verify SQLite mirror updates on issue open/edit/close without REST polling. Document webhook URL in sync drawer Settings tab.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)
- **Status:** Backlog

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `tracker-implementation`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-tracker-ship`
